scripts.build:packages: bun run build:config && bun run build:types && bun run build:utils && bun run build:lib && bun run build:actions && bun run build:assets && bun run build:data && bun run build:store && bun run build:hooks && bun run build:components
scripts.build:apps: bun run build:web && bun run build:admin && bun run build:app
scripts.clean: bun run clean:packages && bun run clean:apps
scripts.clean:packages: bun run clean:config && bun run clean:types && bun run clean:utils && bun run clean:lib && bun run clean:actions && bun run clean:assets && bun run clean:data && bun run clean:store && bun run clean:hooks && bun run clean:components
scripts.clean:config: cd packages/config && bun run clean || rm -rf dist
scripts.clean:types: cd packages/types && bun run clean || rm -rf dist
scripts.clean:utils: cd packages/utils && bun run clean || rm -rf dist
scripts.clean:lib: cd packages/lib && bun run clean || rm -rf dist
scripts.clean:actions: cd packages/actions && bun run clean || rm -rf dist
scripts.clean:assets: cd packages/assets && bun run clean || rm -rf dist
scripts.clean:data: cd packages/data && bun run clean || rm -rf dist
scripts.clean:store: cd packages/store && bun run clean || rm -rf dist
scripts.clean:hooks: cd packages/hooks && bun run clean || rm -rf dist
scripts.clean:components: cd packages/components && bun run clean || rm -rf dist
scripts.clean:apps: bun run clean:web && bun run clean:admin && bun run clean:app
scripts.clean:web: cd apps/web && bun run clean || rm -rf .next
scripts.clean:admin: cd apps/admin && bun run clean || rm -rf .next
scripts.clean:app: cd apps/app && bun run clean || rm -rf .next
